result.markdown:
--- title: "Marketing Dashboard" description: "Interactive marketing performance dashboard — Q1 2025 campaign overview." toc: false --- ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} if (!require("tidyverse")) install.packages("tidyverse") if (!require("ggplot2")) install.packages("ggplot2") if (!require("plotly")) install.packages("plotly") if (!require("dplyr")) install.packages("dplyr") if (!require("knitr")) install.packages("knitr") library(tidyverse) library(ggplot2) library(plotly) library(dplyr) library(knitr) ``` ::: [Live Analytics]{.section-label}
This dashboard tracks key marketing KPIs across all active channels. Built using Tableau Public and R, it aggregates data from Google Analytics 4, paid social exports, and the CRM. ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## KPI Summary — Q1 2025 ```{=html}
Total Reach
142K
▲ 18% vs Q4 2024
Conversions
3,841
▲ 11% vs Q4 2024
Email Open Rate
28.4%
▼ 2% vs Q4 2024
Cost Per Lead
$14.20
▲ Improved 9%
Organic Sessions
68.4K
▲ 34% vs Q4 2024
Avg. Session Duration
2m 18s
▲ 8% vs Q4 2024
``` ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## Monthly Conversions — R Chart ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(tidyverse) conversions <- tibble( month = factor( c("Oct", "Nov", "Dec", "Jan", "Feb", "Mar"), levels = c("Oct", "Nov", "Dec", "Jan", "Feb", "Mar") ), value = c(210, 290, 340, 280, 410, 380), highlight = c(FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE) ) ggplot(conversions, aes(x = month, y = value, fill = highlight)) + geom_col(width = 0.65) + geom_text(aes(label = scales::comma(value)), vjust = -0.5, size = 3.2, family = "sans", color = "#0f2444") + scale_fill_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = "#0f2444", `TRUE` = "#c9a84c"), guide = "none") + scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12)), labels = scales::comma) + labs(x = NULL, y = "Conversions", caption = "Gold bar = peak month (February)") + theme_minimal(base_family = "sans") + theme( axis.text = element_text(color = "#5a5a5a", size = 10), axis.title = element_text(color = "#0f2444", size = 10), panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.caption = element_text(color = "#888", size = 8) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Monthly conversions across all channels, Q1 2025. February spike driven by organic search content refresh.](dashboard_files/figure-html/monthly-conversions-1.png){fig-alt='Bar chart showing monthly conversions from October 2024 through March 2025' width=672} ::: ::: ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## Channel Mix — R Pie / Donut ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} channels <- tibble( channel = c("Organic Search", "Paid Social", "Email", "Direct"), pct = c(42, 28, 18, 12) ) |> mutate( channel = fct_reorder(channel, pct, .desc = TRUE), label = paste0(channel, "\n", pct, "%") ) ggplot(channels, aes(x = 2, y = pct, fill = channel)) + geom_col(width = 1, color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) + coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 0) + xlim(0.5, 2.5) + scale_fill_manual(values = c( "Organic Search" = "#0f2444", "Paid Social" = "#c9a84c", "Email" = "#1a3a6b", "Direct" = "#b0a080" )) + labs(fill = "Channel") + theme_void(base_family = "sans") + theme(legend.position = "right", legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "#1c1c1c")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![Q1 2025 channel mix by conversion volume. Organic search is the top driver.](dashboard_files/figure-html/channel-mix-1.png){fig-alt='Donut chart showing marketing channel mix for Q1 2025' width=672} ::: ::: ::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"} **Key Insight:** Organic search conversions grew 34% in February following the content refresh initiative — the strongest ROI of any channel this quarter. Recommend increasing SEO investment in Q2. :::
